sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 183 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.240/2023 2. For orders on office objection No.1 & 26 3. For orders on CMA No.241/2023 4. For hearing of main case 28.01.2026 Mr. Faheem Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant In pursuance of order dated 21.01.2026 learned counsel states that for the reasons stated therein, this reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
